patterns: Consistent address and contact details appear across site and multiple commercial aggregators
CNPJ appears in third-party aggregators and is used as a pivot for expansion
Branding and presence spread across primary site, LinkedIn and an English site version indicating investment in public image
Multiple directory listings reuse similar address information but show variation in telephone numbers
Existence of legacy/alternate domains and handles referenced in coverage and directories
anomalies: Official site does not display CNPJ or legal registration details visibly
Variation in trade name formatting across sources (e.g., presence/absence of '+ Interiores')
Inconsistent telephone numbers across directory listings
Presence of candidate legacy domain and social handle not directly linked from the official site
known_gaps: Confirmatory query at Receita Federal / extrato CNPJ to validate CNPJ 32.104.558/0001-03
Obtain Junta Comercial records / contrato social to confirm razão social and quadro societário
WHOIS and TLS records check to link domain registration to corporate contact (e-mail) and creation dates
Search judicial databases by confirmed CNPJ for public litigation records
Definitive mapping of telephone numbers to the corporate entity across directories
